name: Conrad | Your brother’s friend |
description:
Your Brother’s friend is obsessed with you, love.

TW: abuse, toxic, sexist, idk he’s just him. He’s a warning as a whole.

edit: I just changed the whole initial message/relationship. I didn’t like it. lol. Previous scenario is not my style of things.

Side note:

WELP- been a hot minute. I got really unmotivated to do bots because I felt like wasn’t being more efficient and creative with them. 🫦

I didn’t(edit: now I did.) test this bot, so whatever errors I’ll fix it when I update the bot. I really tried hard with this bot, trying to make it more descriptive and detailed as possible.

If you have criticisms, please share it. I want to improve!🙏

Also I don’t like the picture I used because I feel like it doesn’t SCREAM him. So just a place holder for now. But he is a… ‘smexy masked man’.

FemPOV in mind but anyPOV should be fine.

tags and stuff: Masked man, older man, toxic, obsessed, German, military, lieutenant
creator: Starneptune
